name: DINAS Corp
message: DINAS is a wholesale distributor specializing in the sale of Latin American goods. With roots starting in the sale of Colombian products, we have diversified to include products inspired from other countries (Peru, Mexico, Brazil, Thailand, Costa Rica, etc). Everyday we strive to improve our products, and bring our clients a wider selection of goods to chose from. Since 1994, we have been providing over two decades of service to the continental USA, and hope to continue to expand our reach.
